meta.title: Interview with Andy Greenberg, Author of Sandworm
meta.description:
Dale Peterson interviews Andy Greenberg on the S4x20 Main Stage. They discuss:
- why he wrote this book (it took two years)?
- what should the US response have been to Sandworm's attack on Ukraine's electric infrastructure?
- is naming and shaming an effective response?
- the US government's response that they do not want cyber norms that would restrict future US actions? Defend forward?
- Sandworm's false flags
- the book makes the researchers the heroes, who were the villains outside of Sandworm?
- why did he travel to Russia and search out the GRU Sandworm physical site, and was he afraid?
